credentials.account: validation.dealer@example.com (+ validation.rival.dealer@example.com, validation.admin@example.com, validation.accounting@example.com, validation.sales@example.com probes)

steps.action: Inspect openapi.json for surviving dealer finance host ownership
steps.expected: Only canonical /api/v1/dealer-portal/** finance routes remain and retired duplicate finance routes are absent
steps.observed: openapi.json published exactly seven dealer finance paths: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/{aging,dashboard,invoices,invoices/{invoiceId}/pdf,ledger,orders} and POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests; all 12 retired duplicate finance paths were absent.

steps.expected: Both inventories match the canonical dealer-portal surface and omit retired duplicates
steps.observed: Both docs inventories listed the same seven canonical dealer-portal finance routes, including POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests, and neither inventory contained any retired duplicate finance path.

steps.action: Probe retired duplicate finance routes with formerly authorized actors
steps.expected: Former finance aliases fail as unmapped/not-found paths
steps.observed: Admin/sales/accounting probes against /api/v1/dealers/2/{ledger,invoices,aging,credit-utilization}, /api/v1/invoices/dealers/2, /api/v1/accounting/{aging,statements}/dealers/2{,/pdf}, and /api/v1/reports/{aging/dealer/2,aging/dealer/2/detailed,dso/dealer/2} all returned 404 application/problem+json with No static resource details.

evidence.network: openapi/docs parity confirmed locally; 12 retired route probes returned 404 with admin/sales/accounting tokens.

steps.action: Fetch dealer and rival dealer finance reads from /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices,aging,orders}
steps.expected: Each dealer sees only its own dealer-scoped records and identifiers
steps.observed: Dealer responses carried dealerId=2 / Validation Dealer and rival responses carried dealerId=3 / Rival Validation Dealer across dashboard, ledger, invoices, aging, and orders; no response exposed the peer dealer name or ID.

steps.action: Identify real invoice fixtures from each dealer invoice list
steps.expected: Each dealer can discover only its own seeded invoice IDs
steps.observed: validation.dealer@example.com received invoiceCount=1 with invoice id=1 number=VAL-MOCK-INV-001 totalOutstanding=1180.0; validation.rival.dealer@example.com received invoiceCount=1 with invoice id=2 number=VAL-RIVAL-INV-001 totalOutstanding=1180.0.

steps.action: Fetch own invoice PDFs and probe cross-dealer invoice PDF access
steps.expected: Own invoice PDF succeeds; cross-dealer PDF lookup fails with not-found
steps.observed: Dealer GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/1/pdf returned 200 application/pdf (2076 bytes) while GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/2/pdf returned 404 Invoice not found; rival dealer GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/2/pdf returned 200 application/pdf (2071 bytes) while GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices/1/pdf returned 404 Invoice not found.

steps.action: Corroborate canonical portal finance visibility for the seeded dealer fixture
steps.expected: Backoffice view agrees the seeded dealer invoice exists without implying cross-dealer leakage to dealer callers
steps.observed: Admin GET /api/v1/portal/finance/invoices?dealerId=2 returned dealerId=2, invoiceCount=1, invoice id=1 / VAL-MOCK-INV-001, aligning with the dealer-owned invoice while dealer-side rival lookups still failed 404.

evidence.network: Dealer and rival dealer finance reads -> 200 with self IDs only; own invoice PDFs -> 200 application/pdf; cross-dealer invoice PDFs -> 404 application/problem+json Invoice not found.

assertions.title: Dealer finance remains read-models plus one explicit light action

steps.action: Inspect dealer-portal verbs in openapi.json and endpoint inventories
steps.expected: Dealer finance exposes GET-only reads plus POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests
steps.observed: openapi.json, docs/endpoint-inventory.md, and erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv all published GET on /api/v1/dealer-portal/{aging,dashboard,invoices,invoices/{invoiceId}/pdf,ledger,orders} and only POST on /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests.

steps.action: Submit the canonical dealer credit-limit request
steps.expected: Approved light action succeeds for the dealer actor
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests with amountRequested=25000.00 and reason="Dealer finance rerun validation request" returned 200 with message=Credit limit request submitted, status=PENDING, dealerName=Validation Dealer.

steps.expected: Other write attempts are absent or method-blocked
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/{dashboard,ledger,invoices,aging,orders} each returned 405 Method Not Allowed.

evidence.network: Canonical credit-limit POST -> 200; unapproved POST writes on dealer finance read endpoints -> 405; docs/openapi verb surfaces matched.

frictions.description: Actuator reported DOWN (503) during the rerun even though authenticated finance endpoints on :8081 remained healthy.
frictions.resolution: Per ERP-21 guidance, continued with direct API probes because /api/v1/auth/login and all targeted dealer-finance endpoints still returned expected responses.

summary: Retested 3 assertions and all 3 passed. Canonical dealer finance remained only under /api/v1/dealer-portal/**, dealer/rival invoice fixtures were self-scoped with own-PDF 200 and cross-dealer PDF 404, and the only surviving dealer-finance write remained POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests.
